```python
        for selector in range(8):
            compressedNum = codeNum[selector]
```

```python
def compress(inp: List[int], currentPos: int, inlength: int, out: List[int], tmpoutpos: int) -> Tuple[int, int]:
    origtmpoutpos = tmpoutpos
    finalpos = currentPos + inlength
    while currentPos < finalpos: 
        for selector in range(8): 
            res = 0
            compressedNum = codeNum[selector]
            if finalpos <= currentPos + compressedNum - 1:
                compressedNum = finalpos - currentPos
            b = bitLength[selector]
            max_val = 1 << b
            for i in range(compressedNum): 
                if Util.smallerorequalthan(max_val, inp[currentPos + i]):
                    continue
                res = (res << b) + inp[currentPos + i]
            if compressedNum != codeNum[selector]:
                res <<= (codeNum[selector] - compressedNum) * b
            res |= selector << 28
            out[tmpoutpos] = res
            tmpoutpos += 1
            currentPos += compressedNum
        else:   # no break occurred in the for loop
            final_selector = 8
            if inp[currentPos] >= 1 << bitLength[final_selector]:
                raise RuntimeError("Too big a number")
            out[tmpoutpos] = inp[currentPos] | (final_selector << 28)
            currentPos += 1
            tmpoutpos += 1
    return origtmpoutpos, tmpoutpos - origtmpoutpos
```
